howItWorks.intro: This smart contract gas cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Gas Cost
rules.formula: Cost (USD) = Gas Units x Gas Price (Gwei) / 1e9 x ETH Price
rules.explanation: Convert gas units to ETH using the gas price, then multiply by the current ETH/USD exchange rate.

howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.q: How much does it cost to deploy a smart contract?
faq.a: Deployment costs depend on contract size and gas prices. A typical ERC-20 token contract costs $50-$500 at moderate gas prices.

faq.q: How can I reduce smart contract gas costs?
faq.a: Optimize storage usage, use events instead of storage where possible, batch operations, and consider Layer 2 solutions like Arbitrum or Optimism.
